title: Recycling Coordinators
description: Supervise curbside and drop-off recycling programs for municipal governments or private firms.

tasks.text: Oversee recycling pick-up or drop-off programs to ensure compliance with community ordinances.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain logs of recycling materials received or shipped to processing companies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Supervise recycling technicians, community service workers, or other recycling operations employees or volunteers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review customer requests for service to determine service needs and deploy appropriate resources to provide service.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Provide training to recycling technicians or community service workers on topics such as safety, solid waste processing, or general recycling operations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Identify or investigate new opportunities for materials to be collected and recycled.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assign truck drivers or recycling technicians to routes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Create or manage recycling operations budgets.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare bills of lading, statements of shipping records, or customer receipts related to recycling or hazardous material services.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Inspect physical condition of recycling or hazardous waste facility for compliance with safety, quality, and service standards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Negotiate contracts with waste management or other firms.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate shipments of recycling materials with shipping brokers or processing companies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Operate recycling processing equipment, such as sorters, balers, crushers, and granulators to sort and process materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate fork lifts, skid loaders, or trucks to move or store recyclable materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Schedule movement of recycling materials into and out of storage areas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Oversee campaigns to promote recycling or waste reduction programs in communities or private companies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate recycling collection schedules to optimize service and efficiency.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop community or corporate recycling plans and goals to minimize waste and conform to resource constraints.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare grant applications to fund recycling programs or program enhancements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Investigate violations of solid waste or recycling ordinances.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Implement grant-funded projects, monitoring and reporting progress in accordance with sponsoring agency requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Make presentations to educate the public on how to recycle or on the environmental advantages of recycling.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Design community solid and hazardous waste management programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
